name: be quiet! PURE BASE 501 Airflow Window Black Mid-Tower ATX Computer Case - Tempered Glass Side Panel - 2x Preinstalled Pure Wings 3 140mm PWM fans - Rotatable PCIe Slots - USB 3.2 Gen. 2 Type-C (BGW74)
